# Product sync — 2026-05-30

## Decisions
- Keep three default columns; allow user-added columns
- JSON backup excludes API keys

## Action items
- Taishi: sample import file for QA
- Team: smoke-test on Chrome restart edge case

## Links
- Roadmap doc (internal)

# API note — tile export shape

Tiles should stay plain objects:

```json
{
  "id": "…",
  "text": "# Title\n\nBody",
  "tags": ["work"],
  "color": "blue"
}
```

Import runs `normalizeColumns()` so missing fields are filled with defaults.

# 1:1 with Alex

**Wins**
- Extension smoke tests green
- Backup flow uses save picker + background download

**Ask**
- Priority between i18n polish vs. new AI prompts

**Next**
- Revisit auto-backup UX after import samples land

# Sunday journal

Slow morning. Coffee, laundry, short walk.

Want to keep weekends light on screens — maybe read the sci-fi paperback on the shelf.
